tests.title: a command present ONLY in the config-declared tikz-command DB is surfaced on the bar AND in completion, and choosing it inserts its declared body at the declared offset
errors: Error: TauriPage command 'eval' failed: window.__PPE_E2E__.tikzCommandNames is not a function. (In 'window.__PPE_E2E__.tikzCommandNames()', 'window.__PPE_E2E__.tikzCommandNames' is undefined)
